content: @xyflow/react v12 has NATIVE support for advanced graph UX with NO extra libraries (reactflow.dev verified 2026-06-26): custom nodes (NodeTypes), multiple handles per node, custom edges (edgeTypes + BaseEdge + getBezierPath/getSmoothStepPath), built-in edge RECONNECT via OnReconnect type + reconnectEdge() util + dedicated Reconnect Edge example, connection validation (isValidConnection, Preventing Cycles example), drag-and-drop palette, connection-limit, easy-connect, proximity-connect, undo/redo, sub-flows. Current stable is 12.11.1 (2026-06-22); Scrysynth ships 12.10.2. The only optional companion libs are layout: elkjs 0.11.1 or @dagrejs/dagre 3.0.0 (maintained fork; old dagre 0.8.5 is unmaintained). Conclusion: graph UX rebuild needs NO new interaction library — just deeper use of React Flow v12 + optional elkjs/dagre.
